name_en: Sunshine Mini Tote, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Black leather FENDI ROMA lettering and tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Lined interior compartment, black leather trim, and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
name_cn:
Sunshine Mini Tote, fabric material, fully adorned with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, accented with transparent sequins. Black leather FENDI ROMA lettering and tortoiseshell-effect hard resin glass handle. Lined interior compartment, black leather trim, and gold metal hardware. Features two handles and an adjustable detachable thin shoulder strap, for hand-carry or shoulder wear.
Size 13/6.5/18cm
